objective: Add server-side search filtering to all connectors using user profile keywords. Instead of fetching broad unfiltered results and only scoring post-fetch, connectors should pass search keywords, skills, and incremental date filters to their respective APIs for more relevant results.

content: Add searchKeywords: string[] to UserProfile type. This field holds user-defined search terms sent to connector APIs for server-side filtering.
reason: Currently no way to pass search preferences to connectors. The stack[] field is only used for post-fetch scoring. We need explicit search keywords that each connector can translate to its API parameters.

content: Create ConnectorSearchContext type in Core with buildSearchContext(profile, lastSync) pure function.
reason: FC&IS pattern: the search context construction is a pure transformation (profile + lastSync → structured params). Each connector (Shell) interprets the context according to its API capabilities.

content: Update PlatformConnector.fetchMissions signature to accept optional ConnectorSearchContext parameter.
reason: Connectors need profile data to build filtered URLs. The context is optional for backward compatibility — connectors that can't filter will simply ignore it.

content: Scanner loads profile + lastSync BEFORE fetching and passes ConnectorSearchContext to each connector.
reason: Currently the scanner loads profile only after fetching for scoring. We need profile data during fetch to enable server-side filtering.

content: FreeWork API hydra:search reveals available params: q (text search on title+reference), properties[] (skills/tags), createdAt[after] (incremental), order[publishedAt] (sort). Currently only contracts=contractor is used. The connector should use ALL available params.
Collective GraphQL API already has query, skills, locations fields in the search input but they are sent empty. Fill them with profile data.
LeHibou sends empty POST body {}. The API likely supports search parameters in the body — add query/skills if the API supports them. If not, document as limited.
Hiway uses Supabase REST. Can add ilike or text search filters. Add title ilike filter for keyword matching.
CherryPick sends POST { page: N }. Explore if the API supports search/query params in the body.
CRITICAL FC&IS RULE: Core (src/lib/core/) must have ZERO async, ZERO I/O, ZERO side effects. The buildSearchContext function must be a pure function. All I/O stays in Shell (src/lib/shell/).

description: as any casts on fixture objects (lines 49, 89, 126, 183). Consider typing FreeWorkApiResponse member items properly to avoid any.

content: FC&IS compliance VERIFIED: search-context.ts (Core) is fully pure — no async, no I/O, no Date.now(), no imports from Shell. All 5 Shell connectors correctly import from Core. Scanner correctly builds search context before fetch loop. TypeScript compiles cleanly (tsc --noEmit). All 71 tests pass (25 search-context + 18 freework + 28 others). Pre-existing violation in core/backup/backup.ts (imports from shell/) is NOT part of this feature.
